suggestions.guidance_rule: Perform more than 5 searches in a single conversation session
suggestions.missing_context: Session-level call counter to track how many times get_events has been invoked within the current conversation session
suggestions.reason: This rule requires tracking the number of get_events calls across multiple invocations within a session. The current input structure includes session_id and turn number, but does not include a counter for how many times a specific tool has been called. To enforce this limit, the system would need to maintain and pass a tool_call_count variable that increments with each get_events invocation.

note: These are suggestions for future system variable additions. They are NOT part of the current policy.
